prompt: Evaluate the described field condition and return the appropriate decision with supporting observations.
scenario: The measurement record for Overcurrent device selection & coordination shows the as-left reading inside the posted limit. The gauge or scale is readable, the setup is stable, and the same value is entered on the inspection form. Reference material on hand: NEC 240, 210.8, 210.12, 110.14(C) termination temp ratings.
title: Measurement check: Overcurrent device selection & coordination (industrial site)
